value User
  id: Int
  nickname: Option<String>
end

let users = [
  User(id: 1, nickname: Some("alpha")),
  User(id: 2, nickname: None),
  User(id: 3, nickname: Some("gamma")),
]

for user in users
  match user.nickname
  when Some(nick)
    print("id=#{user.id},nick=#{nick}")
  when None
    print("id=#{user.id},nick=<anonymous>")
  end
end
